summary: Parish record-keeping app (Internet Computer) with multiple modules (e.g., Chrzty, Śluby, Pogrzeby, Kartoteka, Miejscowości, Wydarzenia, Korespondencja) and PDF export features.

existing_features.title: Add a consistent UI control in every non-Budget module that supports PDF export, allowing the user to choose between exporting (1) the entire list/section to PDF and (2) a single entry/record to PDF.

Implement single-record selection and single-record PDF export flows for the listed modules (e.g., Baptisms, Parishioners/Card index, Localities, Events, Correspondence) using existing PDF generators where available; where a module only has an “export all” PDF today, add a reasonable single-record PDF output for that module’s record type.
Ensure all new export mode labels and user-facing prompts used by this feature are consistent, clear, and localized in the same way as the existing UI for the application.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add option in Chrzty PDF (świadectwo chrztu) to toggle showing/hiding the parish stamp area (miejsce na pieczęć parafialną).
Add PDF export mode selection (export entire section vs single entry) in all modules except Budżet (e.g., Chrzty, Śluby, Pogrzeby, Kartoteka, Miejscowości, Wydarzenia, Korespondencja).

projectName: Add PDF export mode selection (all records vs single record) across modules except Budget
